children.name: ParseCommand
children.purpose: Extract and validate the command field from the input JSON
children.behavior: Parse the input JSON to extract the 'command' field and validate it is one of the allowed commands (send, history, create_channel, join). Return the command and remaining payload.
semantic_inputs: input: Any - Raw JSON input from parent
semantic_outputs: payload: dict - Remaining data after command extraction
postconditions: Command is one of: send, history, create_channel, join
guarantees: Returns error if command is missing or invalid

children.name: SendMessage
children.purpose: Send a message to a joined channel
children.behavior: Validate that the user is a member of the specified channel, then store the message in the messages data store with timestamp and user info.
semantic_inputs: payload: dict - Contains channel_id, user_id, and message text
channels: dict - Data store for channel membership
messages: dict - Data store for messages
semantic_outputs: result: dict - Success or error status
preconditions: User is a member of the channel
postconditions: Message is stored in messages data store
guarantees: Returns error if user not in channel

inputs.name: payload
inputs.description: Contains channel_id, user_id, and message text

children.signature: def SendMessage(payload: dict, channels: dict, messages: dict) -> dict

children.name: GetHistory
children.purpose: Retrieve message history for a channel
children.behavior: Validate that the user is a member of the channel, then fetch up to 100 most recent messages from the messages data store for that channel.
semantic_inputs: payload: dict - Contains channel_id and user_id
channels: dict - Data store for channel membership
messages: dict - Data store for messages
semantic_outputs: history: list - List of up to 100 messages
preconditions: User is a member of the channel
guarantees: Returns error if user not in channel
children.signature: def GetHistory(payload: dict, channels: dict, messages: dict) -> list

children.name: CreateChannel
children.behavior: Create a new channel entry in the channels data store with a unique channel_id and add the creator as the first member.
semantic_inputs: payload: dict - Contains channel_name and creator user_id
channels: dict - Data store for channels
semantic_outputs: channel_id: str - Unique identifier for the new channel
preconditions: Channel name is non-empty and unique
postconditions: Channel is created and creator is a member
guarantees: Returns error if channel name already exists

outputs.name: channel_id
outputs.description: Unique identifier for the new channel

children.signature: def CreateChannel(payload: dict, channels: dict) -> str

children.name: JoinChannel
children.behavior: Validate that the channel exists and the user is not already a member, then add the user to the channel's member list.
semantic_inputs: payload: dict - Contains channel_id and user_id
channels: dict - Data store for channels
semantic_outputs: result: dict - Success or error status
preconditions: User is not already a member
postconditions: User is added to channel member list
guarantees: Returns error if channel does not exist or user already member
children.signature: def JoinChannel(payload: dict, channels: dict) -> dict

children.name: FormatResponse
children.behavior: Take the result from the executed command and format it into a standard JSON response with success, data, and message fields.
semantic_inputs: command_result: Any - Result from the executed child function
command: str - Original command for context
postconditions: Output is valid JSON with success, data, message
guarantees: Always returns a consistent response structure

inputs.name: command_result
inputs.description: Result from the executed child function

children.signature: def FormatResponse(command_result: Any, command: str) -> dict

dataflow_edges.note: Raw JSON input sent to ParseCommand
Validated command returned to parent for routing
Remaining payload returned to parent for routing
Payload sent to SendMessage when command is 'send'
Payload sent to GetHistory when command is 'history'
Payload sent to CreateChannel when command is 'create_channel'
Payload sent to JoinChannel when command is 'join'
Result returned to parent for formatting
History list returned to parent for formatting
New channel ID returned to parent for formatting
Result returned to parent for formatting
Original command sent to FormatResponse for context
Formatted JSON response returned to parent
